task_completion.description: Create a new data tag named 'TT_001'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Crimson 3.0 Navigation Pane under 'Data Tags', a tag named 'TT_001' is visible and selected.

task_completion.description: Set the tag data type to Float
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tag properties (Data tab), the Data Type or Extent is set to 'Floating Point' or 'Float'.

task_completion.description: Set the tag label/description to 'Ambient Temperature Sensor'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tag properties (Format or Data tab), the Label or Description field contains the text 'Ambient Temperature Sensor'.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum and maximum limits for the tag
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tag properties (Format tab), the Data Scale or Limits section shows a Minimum value of -1.9 and a Maximum value of 44.6.

task_completion.description: Configure the low and high alarm thresholds
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tag properties (Alarms tab), events are configured with a Low (or Absolute Low) value of 0.65 and a High (or Absolute High) value of 35.98.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path 'C:\Users\ga\Documents\AmbientSensor.cd3', or the Crimson 3.0 application title bar displays 'AmbientSensor' or 'AmbientSensor.cd3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Red Lion Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the tag
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Crimson 3.0 application windows and dialogs, not a script, terminal, or text editor.

integrity.description: Values were entered into the correct configuration fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific values (-1.9, 44.6, 0.65, 35.98) are visible in their respective input boxes within the Crimson 3.0 tag properties tabs, not just pasted into a single text block or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file menu or save dialog was used within Crimson 3.0, rather than just creating a dummy file via command line.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tag must be named 'TT_001'. The Data Type must be 'Float' (Floating Point). The Label/Description must be 'Ambient Temperature Sensor'. The Minimum limit is -1.9 and Maximum limit is 44.6. The Low Alarm threshold is 0.65 and High Alarm threshold is 35.98. The project must be saved as 'AmbientSensor.cd3' in C:\Users\ga\Documents\.
